allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Feature: Rename Dashboard Quick Wins tile to Actions with combined count

Update Dashboard''s third summary tile to better reflect its purpose as an
action queue preview. The "Actions" tile now shows the total count of all
actionable items \(Quick Wins + overdue Manual Checks\) instead of just
Quick Wins.

Changes:
- Rename tile from "Quick Wins" to "Actions"
- Calculate total actionable items: Quick Wins + overdue Manual Checks
- Update subtitle to show "X Total" \(was "X Available"\)
- Maintain "All Done!" display when no actions pending
- Navigation to Actions tab remains unchanged

This aligns with the Dashboard''s UX philosophy as a status display that
previews work available in the Actions tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(adb shell am start -n com.techtrest.privacywidget/.MainActivity 2>&1 && sleep 5 && adb logcat -s GMS_DEBUG -d 2>&1)
Bash(adb shell am start -n com.techtrest.privacywidget/.MainActivity 2>&1 && sleep 5 && adb logcat -s GoogleServicesChecker -d 2>&1)
